decision.rationale: StatCard CLI wins on total score. Ships in 10 days with zero external infra — a binary that runs locally against API-Football. The 66% of LATAM football fans (14-49) consume creator analysis content weekly per the 2026 YouTube report, and zero existing CLI tools serve Spanish-speaking football creators who post 3-5 times per day.
non_goals: Custom branded templates beyond creator watermark
Real-time match data or live score integration
decision.target_user: Solo football content creator in Argentina, Mexico, or Colombia with 5k–200k followers on Twitter or Instagram who publishes 3–5 stats-based image posts per day and currently builds each card manually in Canva
decision.positioning: For solo LATAM football content creators who post daily stats cards, StatCard CLI is the command-line automation tool that compresses 60 minutes of manual research and design into a single Spanish-language prompt.

price_points: $0/month Free: 5 cards per day, 2 fixed templates, mandatory watermark
$12/month Pro: 100 cards per day, 3 templates, custom watermark text, priority API-Football quota
monetization.why_people_pay: A creator posting 3 cards per day spends 3 hours daily on manual research and Canva work. At minimum wage in Mexico (~$14 USD/day), that labor costs more than a month of Pro in a single day.

metrics.north_star: Cards generated per week across all active users — target: ≥ 150 cards/week by end of week 4 post-launch
metrics.activation: First card successfully generated and saved to disk within 10 minutes of binary install — target: ≥ 65% of new users
metrics.retention: Users who generate at least 3 cards in week 1 and return in week 3 — target: ≥ 35% of activated users
metrics.revenue: Free-tier users who upgrade to Pro within 14 days — target: ≥ 6% of activated users
ops: Zero panic-exits per release build on macOS and Linux amd64

must_have: Spanish-language CLI prompt parser that extracts two player or team names and an optional competition context
API-Football adapter that fetches head-to-head or season stats using the free tier
One hardcoded SVG card template rendered to PNG via a pure Go SVG-to-PNG pipeline (no Puppeteer)
Output in 1:1 (1080x1080px) and 4:5 (1080x1350px) formats saved to current working directory
Creator watermark text injected into card footer (configurable via --watermark flag)
Single static binary installable via curl-to-bash or direct download, no runtime dependencies
Daily card counter enforced locally (file-based counter in ~/.statcard/) to gate free tier at 5 cards/day
ship_criteria: Running 'statcard generate "Riquelme vs Zidane Champions League"' on a clean macOS machine produces two PNG files in under 90 seconds
Generated PNG contains correct stat values from API-Football
Free-tier daily limit of 5 cards enforced
Binary runs on macOS arm64, macOS amd64, and Linux amd64
